sdkBundles.description: Bundled @servicenow/sdk + @servicenow/glide for authoring Flow Designer flows, Script Includes, ACLs, and more declaratively in TypeScript.

servers.description: Drive a real browser for ServiceNow UI work — flow validation, workspace probing, portal smoke, dashboard verification, playbook UI checks. Per-project Chromium profile preserves saved passwords, history, and any persistent cookies (incl. SN 'Remember me' sessions when ticked at login).

headed.label: Show browser window (headed mode)
headed.description: Headed mode lets you watch the automation. Disable for headless / CI.

screenshotsDir.label: Screenshots folder
screenshotsDir.description: Where Playwright saves screenshots. Path is relative to project root.

profileDir.label: Browser profile folder
profileDir.description: Persistent Chromium profile per project. Preserves saved passwords, history, localStorage, and any cookies the server flags as persistent. SN's default session cookie is session-only — tick 'Remember me' at login if you want auth to survive browser close. Per-project keeps SN instance sessions isolated.

useCases: Building or validating Flow Designer flows
